title: How long before Monday.com Workflows rolls out?

posts.author: bglick (Bradley Glick)
posts.cookedHtml:
As the title states, how long before we can expect to see Workflows on our account?

We are on an Enterprise plan, and have still yet to see AI, Workflows, WorkCanvas, etc. rolled out for us.

Any help would be greatly appreciated!

posts.author: dnmonday (Desmond)
posts.cookedHtml:
Workflows - I saw recently a response in another thread saying end of Q1 is the expected date for the public release. Keep in mind, this deadline has been pushed back a few times already from the threads I’ve been tracking.

WorkCanvas - This was talked about in the New Releases webinar for February just last week. Have you checked again if you have access to it?

AI - I haven’t seen any information lately on this. We’re also Enterprise plan and don’t have this feature yet.
